summarize.description: When true, omit the full affected-id array and return only counts + a small preview (size capped by maxResults). Defaults to false. Mutually exclusive with `groupBy` — when `groupBy` is set, the response shape switches to grouped buckets/modules and `summarize` is ignored.

maxResults.description: Maximum number of affected-symbol IDs embedded in the response. When the transitive set is larger, the array is clipped and `truncated:true` is set. Default: 500 in normal mode, 25 in summarize mode.

groupBy.description: Optional grouping mode. 'bucket' = Production/Test/Editor/Generated; 'module' = per-module/asmdef counts; 'both' = both groupings populated; 'none' (default) = legacy flat shape. INV-BLAST-RADIUS-GROUP-001.

previewPerGroup.description: Cap on preview entries per bucket/module when `groupBy` is set. 0 = no preview, counts only. Default: 5.
